title: Wilds of Auroria
description: Cobblemon: Wilds of Auroria is a lightweight modpack that blends Cobblemon—Minecraft’s take on Pokémon—with a vibrant world built for exploration and creativity. Join friends to collect and train creatures, delve into dungeons, and build epic bases, all wh
body:
Cobblemon: Wilds of Auroria is a modpack that combines the whimsical charm of Cobblemon—where your favorite blocky creatures roam free—with a vibrant, ever-evolving world known as Auroria. Step into a land brimming with lush biomes, expansive dungeons, and hidden treasures, all designed to keep explorers enthralled at every turn.

Build your dream base, train and evolve your Cobblemon team, and embark on thrilling quests to uncover the mysteries that lie within ancient ruins. The modpack is carefully balanced to enrich both creativity and adventure, ensuring that ranchers, battlers, builders, and lore-seekers alike have plenty to sink their teeth into. With a focus on performance and ease of access, Wilds of Auroria features quality-of-life mods that streamline your journey—such as improved inventory management, mini-maps for navigation, and optional cosmetic enhancements to personalize your experience.

Whether you’re an experienced Pokémon trainer who wants to see your favorite critters in Minecraft form, or a curious adventurer searching for a fresh playground to explore, Cobblemon: Wilds of Auroria offers a seamless blend of creature collecting, open-world discovery, and survival challenge. Dive in, assemble your team, and shape your own legendary story in the untamed Wilds of Auroria!
